reviews.review_description: I couldn't figure out what direction to hit the ball in or where the hole was. Lack of any guidance. Uninstalled.
Terrible game. Don’t waste your time

reviews.review_title: How do you make a game this bad?
reviews.review_description: This was honestly the worst game i have ever played, the quality is awful, The game has 0 indication of where the hole is, the ball never goes where your hitting it too, and yet this is the most fun i have had in a while, its was lots of fun watching as this game begins to deteriorate and worsen

developer_response.body:
Haha sorry, I'm a solo developer!

Working on improving things!

reviews.review_description: Looks like a fun game but the way they make you hold the club is in bearable. So is the noise if you hit the ball out of the course demented!!!

developer_response.body:
Hey man, there is no "they", it's just me!

I really appreciate your comment! I went and fixed some of the things you mentioned. I'll be adding more content and maps when I get the time! I hope you check it out :)

reviews.review_description: Amazing crazy goodness and good and spectacular and fabulous

and the graphics are extremely bad
and its not well made

developer_response.body: I'm trying man! It's hard to optimize for what's basically an android phone :)

reviews.review_description: It was a fun game, can’t wait to see future updates

developer_response.body: Hey man, you're welcome to join me in developing it :)
